name: microsoft-dataverse-mcp-frontier
title: Microsoft Dataverse
summary: Enables Dataverse data and schema operations (query, table & record management, API invocation).
description: Enables Dataverse data and schema operations (query, table & record management, API invocation). This feature is in preview and is part of the Work IQ tools, providing shared work intelligence and actions for agents. Availability and capabilities are subject to change. Learn more: https://aka.ms/AboutWorkIQ

useCases.name: List tables & inspect schemas
useCases.description: List Dataverse tables and inspect fields/schema to drive downstream queries and UI selection.

useCases.name: Query data
useCases.description: Run SELECT-style queries to retrieve rows and perform filtering, sorting, and paging for agent workflows.

useCases.name: Invoke Dataverse APIs
useCases.description: Enumerate available Dataverse APIs and invoke a named API with provided inputs.

useCases.name: Table and record management
useCases.description: Create, update, and delete tables and records as part of automation or data ingestion flows.

useCases.name: List prompts & knowledge sources
useCases.description: List available prompts and knowledge sources in the environment for guided agent interactions or retrieval augmentation.

a365dataverseoauth2.description: Authenticate with Work IQ using OAuth2 authorization code flow with PKCE support.
